positive: covered:wires the Operational Work History artifact end-to-end
negative: covered:must be pinned to a full 40-character commit SHA
waiver: none-by-design:This is a static-inspection regression test on the real workflow file itself; there is no legitimate reason to waive proof that the real CI job actually wires the checker it claims to run.
notes: Statically parses pr-policy.yml (mirroring test-required-workflows-contract.sh's direct-parse style) to prove pinned+head-SHA checkout, least-privilege permissions, collector-before-checker ordering, the real --out wiring, --head-sha passthrough, and a SHA-pinned artifact upload — so the new gate cannot silently rot in the real workflow while its own fixture tests still pass in isolation.
